title: Living in Boulder Vlog 5 - 29 - 2014 (Showing scars as requested)

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief daily vlog update for May 29, 2014, covering his work day, listening to a book called 'Behind the Scenes' by Elizabeth Cascill, and showing scars from a self-performed mole/cyst removal on his neck at viewers' request.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Acknowledges it looks and feels bad but plans to do it again
Enjoys easy reads that can be finished in one day; considering branching out to new titles including possibly the Bible

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got up and worked two places yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked all afternoon on the porch until like seven.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked in my room until like ten.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got to sleep at like eleven.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm getting close to being done with this one page.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I listened to 'Behind the Scenes' by Elizabeth Cascill yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll do a video about 'Behind the Scenes' by Elizabeth Cascill.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I might listen to some other new things.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was gonna get the Bible, but maybe it's good to spread that out a little bit.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's cool listening to a new book that's an easy read when you get through it in one day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I filmed my sister's scar healing up when I cut the one out of my neck.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to do it myself.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The scar looks ugly and feels bad, but I'll do it pretty soon.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm kind of tired right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll do another update and put the flakes in.

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder vlog. Today's the 30th, so this would be for the 29th.
Yesterday I got up and I worked two places, came back and worked all afternoon on the
Porch until like 7 and then in my room until like 10. And then got to sleep at like 11
But yeah, I'm getting close to being done with this one page I'm working on.
Um, and uh, that's about all. That's about all that happened. Uh, I listened to, uh, behind
The scenes by Elizabeth Caskill yesterday. I'll do a video about that. It was going to
Yesterday but I didn't get around to it. And today I think I might listen to some other
New things. I was looking at the Bible but it was kind of getting old so maybe it's good
To spread that out a little bit. It's cool listening to a new book that's an easy read
When you get through it in one day. That's really fun. So maybe I'll try that again today.
And I filmed my, uh, my cyst, my lipoma scar healing up. I want to cut the one out of my
Neck. I want to do it myself. It looks ugly and it feels bad but I'll do it pretty soon
I think. Uh, and that's about that. That's about it. Okay. Peace out. I'm kind of tired
Right now by the way. Six toys away. Ooh, um, and I work at eight. Okay. Peace out.
My cyst removal scars. There's the right one. Left one. I'll do another update in a couple
